segments.text: All right. So yeah, I'm writing a profile of Levy. Uh, she's one of the other interns. I understand you guys have worked together in the past.
Yeah. Yeah, so she's our communications intern. Uh, this is her last week, and we're really gonna miss her. And I'm the communications specialist here at eScience.
Awesome. Uh, can you tell me a little bit more about the projects you've worked on or that you've gotten to see her work on?
Yeah. So, Levy was here for a number of things. Um, kind of the first thing she was hired on to do, uh, was to help with the formatting, uh, and the written content of our newsletter.
We have a weekly newsletter or bulletin that we send out, uh, that's largely about data science and AI content coming out of the eScience Institute.

Um, Levy was such a perfect and unique fit for this, because I, I think it's very hard sometimes to find someone who likes writing, knows how to do it, knows how to do a lot of communications and media tasks, and is also, like, someone who knows what data science is-

... and is actually very proficient in it. So, she was a really strong fit for that. Um, some of the projects that we've done since then, uh, have been a few things. We launched the very first Instagram for our institute. Uh, and she's made several really-
